mapper.select: SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, B.INSR_STAT_CD, C.INSR_PROD_CD AS ORDER_EXIST, D.CONTRACT_NUM AS REQUEST_EXIST FROM MSP_REQUEST_DTL@DL_MSP A, MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER@DL_MSP B, (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, INSR_PROD_CD FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{ncn} AND IF_TRGT_CD NOT IN ('C', 'F') AND TO_DATE(STRT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') > TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND ROWNUM = 1) C, /* ASIS: NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_MST → TOBE: MSF_CUST_REQUEST_MST (M포탈DB → MSF DB 교체) */ (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSF_CUST_REQUEST_MST WHERE REQ_TYPE = 'IS' AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{ncn} AND TO_CHAR(SYS_RDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND ROWNUM = 1) D WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{ncn} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND (B.INSR_STAT_CD <> 2 OR B.INSR_STAT_CD IS NULL)

SELECT DISTINCT T1.INSR_PROD_CD AS insrProdCd, T1.CMPN_LMT_AMT AS cmpnLmtAmt, T1.INSR_ENGG_CNT AS insrEnggCnt, T1.INSR_TYPE_CD AS insrTypeCd, T2.DTL_CD_NM AS insrProdNm FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MST@DL_MSP T1 /* ASIS: NMCP_CD_DTL → TOBE: MSF_CD_DTL (M포탈DB → MSF DB 교체) */ LEFT JOIN MSF_CD_DTL T2 ON T1.INSR_PROD_CD = T2.DTL_CD AND T2.CD_GROUP_ID = 'IntmInsrRelNm' WHERE T1.USG_YN = 'Y'
AND T1.INSR_TYPE_CD = '02'
AND T1.INSR_PROD_CD IN ( SELECT INSR_PROD_CD FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_REL@DL_MSP WHERE RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} AND APPL_YN = 'Y' )
ORDER BY T1.CMPN_LMT_AMT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MSF_CUST_REQUEST_INSR ( REQUEST_KEY, NCN, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, INSR_CD, INSR_PROD_CD, CLAUSE_INSURANCE_YN, CLAUSE_INSR_PROD_YN, INSR_AUTH_INFO ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{ncn}, NOW(), #{custId}, #{insrCd}, #{insrProdCd}, #{clauseInsuranceYn}, #{clauseInsrProdYn}, #{insrAuthInfo} )
